scene_title: Título original riscado — The Last Man in Europe
narrative_beat: Close-up macro of typewritten manuscript cover page in rich ochre and crimson, red-penned strike through THE LAST MAN IN EUROPE

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a typewritten manuscript title page on cream paper with vintage serif typeface reading THE LAST MAN IN EUROPE
subject.focal_point: a single diagonal red pen strike scored across the title by a visible aged hand
subject.secondary: P&B office desk background. Floating dust.

composition.foreground: manuscript and red strike in rich ochre and crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: The Last Man in Europe — original title
symbolism.secondary: strike as editorial rebirth of title

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: vintage typewriter serif uppercase letters in warm printed ochre, red diagonal pen strike over
in_scene_text.medium: typed on manuscript cover with red ink strike overlay
in_scene_text.placement: centered upper third of page, with red strike diagonal

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
